summary: Senior AI Systems architect specializing in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) loops, agentic orchestration, cost engineering, and chunking models optimization.

bullets: Designed and shipped new scalable cloud subsystems, resulting in a 25% reduction in page latency metrics.
Collaborated with cross-functional partners to deploy secure microservices, lowering incident triage time by 40%.
Led team of 4 engineers, introducing weekly code reviews that improved unit test coverage to 92%.
Built robust REST API integration layers supporting 10k+ concurrent active users daily.
Optimized database queries and added indexing, reducing average response latency by 150ms.

projects.name: Open-Source Rag Engineer Portal
projects.description: Collaborative project mapping distributed architecture patterns to clean client interfaces.
bullets: Scaled application from scratch, acquiring 500+ stars on GitHub within three weeks of launch.
Integrated automated CI/CD pipeline steps, reducing deployment time from 15 minutes to 3 minutes.

achievements: 1st Place in University Annual Hackathon (200+ competitors)
Published technical writeup on distributed scaling in a major developer publication
